[@microsoft/fast-element/declarative.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [declarativeTemplate](../fast-element.declarativetemplate/index.html)

## declarativeTemplate() function

Returns a declarative template resolver that waits for the matching `<f-template>` element and resolves it into a concrete `ViewTemplate`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function declarativeTemplate(callbacks?: TemplateLifecycleCallbacks): FASTElementTemplateResolver;
```
